title: auth api login functionality
description: Verify that the login endpoint correctly authenticates users using sicil number and password, enforces IP whitelist checks, and returns appropriate tokens.

title: users api user management
description: Test user creation, retrieval, update, and deletion functionalities ensuring role-based access control and data validation.

title: roles api role management
description: Validate role creation, assignment, update, and deletion with proper access restrictions and data integrity.

title: auditlog api logging and retrieval
description: Ensure all critical operations are logged correctly and audit logs can be retrieved securely via the API.

title: dashboard api statistics retrieval
description: Check that dashboard endpoints return accurate and timely statistics reflecting system status and user activities.

title: ip restrictions api management
description: Test adding, updating, and removing IP and IP block restrictions and verify enforcement during user login.

title: backup api database backup and restore
description: Verify database backup creation, retrieval, and restoration functionalities including maintenance mode activation.

title: birimler api department management
description: Test department (birim) creation, update, deletion, and retrieval ensuring role-based access and data consistency.

title: unvanlar api title management
description: Validate title (unvan) management endpoints for CRUD operations with proper validation and access control.

title: permissions api permission management
description: Ensure permission management endpoints correctly handle creation, update, deletion, and assignment of permissions.
